Button.notes: React project primary action button; at most one primary variant per screen. children type is ReactNode, matching Tech Stack = React in DESIGN_BRIEF.md. Touch target >= 44px (accessibility hard constraint).

Card.notes: Vue project product list card; supports selected state. header/default slot type is VNode, matching Tech Stack = Vue in DESIGN_BRIEF.md. Hover state has a 200ms transition animation (ease-out).

Modal.notes: Svelte project modal dialog. trigger/children type is Snippet (Svelte 5 syntax), matching Tech Stack = Svelte in DESIGN_BRIEF.md. Must support ESC key close + focus trap (accessibility).

props.items: Array<{ label: string; href: string; active?: boolean }>

Navigation.notes: Native Web Components project main navigation. container type is HTMLElement, matching Tech Stack = Vanilla/Web Components in DESIGN_BRIEF.md. Keyboard navigation must support Tab/Arrow keys, conforming to the WAI-ARIA Menu pattern.
